# Transform Your Research with AI‑Powered Insight Reports

## Unlock Deep Market Intelligence at Scale

**Instant, data‑driven research reports** generated by our cutting‑edge AI engine, built on Google Deep Research Max concepts. No more manual data wrangling – get actionable insights in seconds.

---

### Why Choose Our SaaS?

- **AI‑Driven Accuracy** – Leverages the latest large‑model research techniques for reliable, citation‑backed findings.
- **One‑Click Reports** – Choose a topic, set parameters, and receive a fully formatted PDF/HTML report.
- **Customizable Templates** – Brand‑your reports, add executive summaries, charts, and data tables.
- **API‑First** – Integrate report generation into your own workflow or product.
- **Enterprise‑Grade Security** – SOC‑2 compliant, encrypted at rest and in transit.

---

| Plan | Monthly Price | Reports / Month | Features |

| **Starter** | **$49** | 10 | Basic templates, API access (rate‑limited), email support |
